name: workflow state contract validator emits a structured json record for downstream tooling
command: mkdir -p .claude-tdd-pro && printf '{"session_id":"s1"}\n' > .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/workflow/validate-state-contract.sh" --state .claude-tdd-pro/workflow-state.json --emit json --out result.json 2>err.txt && grep -q '"valid"' result.json && grep -q '"session_id":"s1"' result.json && echo ok 1>&2
